joinOrganizationText: Here you can enter the token/code that was sent to your email. This will grant you access to the projects that belong to this organization.
firstToken: Enter the invitation token/code sent to your email.
validToken: The token was successfully validated. You can see the organization you just joined below.
firstTokenDescription: Enter the invitation token sent to your email.
validatingTokenDescription: Please wait while your token is being validated...
